name: NTT COTOHA
description: NTT Communications Japanese-language NLP platform — morphology, similarity, summarization and speech APIs.

seo.title: NTT COTOHA — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: NTT COTOHA: NTT Communications Japanese-language NLP platform — morphology, similarity, summarization and speech APIs.

when_to_use: Processing Japanese NLP tasks (parsing, sentiment, NER) via API
Analyzing customer feedback in Japanese at scale
Integrating Japanese POS tagging into search or analytics tools

pros: Summarization and speech in one suite
review.verdict: Strong Japanese NLP for enterprises that need NTT accountability more than modern LLM flexibility.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises needing regulated NLP and speech APIs
review.not_for: Multilingual products or teams outside Japan

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
